name: Marjoram-Scented Red Bell Pepper Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper - roasted, peeled & diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the lime juice into a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the balsamic vinegar to the bowl.
3. Stir in the chopped shallots.
4. Slowly whisk in both oils until fully combined.
5. Mix in the toasted pine nuts and diced red bell pepper.
6. Sprinkle with marjoram.
7. Allow the dressing to infuse for 10 to 15 minutes before serving.
